title.en: I couldn't agree more! I totally agree! 완전히 동감이에요! 전적으로 동의해요!

description.en: When someone's opinion perfectly matches yours! Learn how to express strong agreement using "Dong-gam" and "Dong-ui".
description.ko: 상대방의 의견이 내 생각과 완벽하게 일치할 때! "동감"과 "동의"를 사용해 격한 공감을 표현하는 법을 배워봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Agreement. Empathy. Opinion. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world. Welcome back to Talkori. I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 안녕하세요 여러분~! 여러분의 공감 능력을 무한대로 키워드릴 미나입니다.
content.translation: Hello everyone~! I'm Mina. here to infinitely grow your empathy skills.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Mina. I think the best way to spend a Sunday is just staying in bed. watching movies. and eating snacks.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 와 완전히 동감이에요!
content.translation: Wow~ 'I completely agree'!

insight.title: 완전히 동감이에요
insight.usage_tip: 'Dong-gam' means having the same feeling or emotion.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그 말에 전적으로 동의해요! 일요일은 그래야죠!
content.translation: I 'entirely agree' with that~! That's what Sundays are for!

insight.title: 전적으로 동의해요
insight.usage_tip: 'Dong-ui' means having the same opinion or decision.

content.speaker: John
content.text: "I couldn't agree more!" I'm glad we have the same Sunday vibe.

content.speaker: John
content.text: "동감" and "동의". They sound very similar to "Agreement".

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요! "동감"은 상대방과 똑같은 '느낌'을 받을 때 주로 써요.
content.translation: Exactly! 'Dong-gam' is mainly used when you feel the same 'emotion' as the other person.

content.speaker: John
content.text: "완전히..., 동감이에요~!"
content.translation: I completely feel the same~!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그리고 "동의"는 상대방의 '의견'이나 '생각'에 찬성할 때 쓰는 표현이에요.
content.translation: And 'Dong-ui' is an expression used when you agree with someone's 'opinion' or 'thought'.

content.speaker: John
content.text: "전적으로..., 동의해요!"
content.translation: I entirely agree!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Is there a way to say That's what I'm saying.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그럴 땐. "제 생각이 바로 그거예요!" 라고 해보세요.
content.translation: In that case. try saying 'Je saeng-gak-i baro geugeoyeyo!'.

insight.title: 제 생각이 바로 그거예요
insight.usage_tip: Used when someone expresses your thoughts perfectly.

content.speaker: John
content.text: "제 생각이..., 바로 그거예요~!"
content.translation: That's exactly my thought~!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Imagine we are talking about a famous bakery. I say. that place has the best salt bread in the world!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 와~ 존 씨. 저도 거기 어제 갔다 왔어요!
content.translation: Wow~ John. I went there yesterday too!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Right? It's so crispy on the outside. and soft on the inside.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: "완전히 동감이에요~!" 진짜 인생 빵집이에요!
content.translation: I completely agree~! It's truly the best bakery of my life!

content.speaker: John
content.text: We should go there every morning.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그 말에는 "전적으로 동의해요!" 내일 아침에 만날까요?
content.translation: I 'entirely agree' with that! Shall we meet tomorrow morning?

content.speaker: John
content.text: "좋았어~!" 역시 우리 마음이 딱 맞네요!
content.translation: Nice~! As expected. our hearts are perfectly in sync!

content.speaker: John
content.text: "I couldn't agree more!" Let's go!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 빵 이야기할 때가 제일 진지한 것 같아요.
content.translation: You seem most serious when talking about bread.

content.speaker: John
content.text: These expressions are so good for showing that you're listening.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 누군가와 깊은 대화를 나눌 때 오늘 배운 표현들을 꼭 써보세요!
content.translation: Right. Make sure to use the expressions we learned today when having a deep conversation with someone!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "strong agreement" reactions.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number one. "완전히 동감이에요~!"
content.translation: I completely agree!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number two. "전적으로 동의해요!"
content.translation: I entirely agree!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number three. "제 생각이 바로 그거예요!"
content.translation: That's exactly what I thought!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number four. "백퍼센트 동감입니다!"
content.translation: I agree one hundred percent!

insight.title: 백퍼센트 동감
insight.usage_tip: A very casual and strong way to show you agree completely.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number five. "그 말에 전적으로 공감해요!"
content.translation: I entirely empathize with those words!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 누군가와 마음이 통하는 하루 보내시길 바랄게요!
content.translation: I hope you all have a day where your hearts connect with someone today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 저도 그 말에 동감입니다. (I feel the same way.)
제 제안에 동의하시나요? (Do you agree with my proposal?)
저는 전적으로 존 씨 편이에요. (I'm entirely on John's side.)
숙제를 완전히 끝냈어요. (I've completely finished my homework.)
누구나 공감할 수 있는 이야기예요. (It's a story anyone can empathize with.)
